essence: Designs and delivers projects to restore degraded habitats and improve ecosystem function.

identity.title: Habitat Restoration Specialist
identity.summary: Plans and implements restoration works such as rewilding, wetland creation, and native planting to recover biodiversity.

salary.notes: Project managers and consultants in large restoration programmes earn higher salaries.

qualifications: Experience in ecology, habitat management, or restoration projects
Project management and contractor coordination skills
Knowledge of native species and restoration techniques
Ability to monitor outcomes and adapt interventions

lifestyle.description: Mix of field delivery and planning; often works with NGOs, landowners, and funders to deliver measurable outcomes.

habits: Monitors ecological outcomes and adapts work
Secures funding and reports to stakeholders
